selection_logic.objective: controlled 100-row stamped scale-up using already-proven prerelease/staff-prerelease patterns
deterministic_filters: include only stamp_label in {Prerelease Stamp, Staff Prerelease Stamp}
rationale: finish the remaining prerelease/staff-prerelease rows in the already-proven black-and-white promo family first
then scale on the same prerelease/staff-prerelease rule shape in sm-promos-pokemon
avoid introducing e-league, detective, worlds, generic staff, and other new stamp families in this pass
